title: lasianthus capitatus subsp. vietnamensis
intro: Lasianthus capitatus subsp. vietnamensis, also known as Vietnamese lasianthus, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Theaceae. It has been traditionally used in Southeast Asian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Lasianthus capitatus subsp. vietnamensis is often used as a tea or decoction to take advantage of its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
